summary: Iteration 163: HotelRunner v2 Ops Dashboard - Full E2E testing completed. Backend API /api/channel/hotelrunner-v2/ops-dashboard returns 200 OK with all required data sections. Frontend page at /hrv2-ops renders correctly after login with all panels, buttons, and Turkish language UI working. All 14 data-testid attributes verified. All 3 action buttons (Baglanti Testi, Reconciliation Baslat, Yenile) trigger APIs and show toast notifications.

issues: i18n translation keys showing as raw keys (common.welcome, auth.signIn, etc.) - pre-existing issue from iteration 161

critical_code_review_comments: Backend ops-dashboard endpoint correctly aggregates data from multiple sources (flags, metrics, DLQ, drifts, events)
Frontend HRv2OpsDashboard.jsx correctly uses tenant_id=syroce_default for API queries
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Turkish language labels used throughout (Provider Sagligi, Senkronizasyon Durumu, Hata Gorunurlugu, Son Olaylar, Son Driftler, Islem Detaylari)
Toast notifications working correctly with sonner library

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI components render and function correctly

seed_data_creation: None - used existing syroce_default tenant data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 163 verified HotelRunner v2 Ops Dashboard feature. Backend endpoint GET /api/channel/hotelrunner-v2/ops-dashboard?tenant_id=syroce_default&property_id=default returns aggregated dashboard data including: provider_health (auth_status, reservations_api, shadow_mode, write_path), feature_flags (connector_enabled, shadow_mode, write_enabled, reconciliation_enabled, auto_fix_enabled), sync_overview (drift_count, last_reconciliation), metrics_24h (operations breakdown, success rates, latencies), dlq (count, recent_entries), recent_events, recent_drifts. Frontend at /hrv2-ops displays all data in Turkish language UI with interactive buttons for test-connection, reconciliation, and refresh. All data-testid attributes verified: ops-dashboard, provider-health-panel, operational-actions-panel, sync-overview-panel, failure-visibility-panel, recent-events-panel, recent-drifts-panel, operations-breakdown-panel, shadow-mode-badge, refresh-dashboard-btn, test-connection-btn, trigger-reconciliation-btn, refresh-status-btn, operations-table.

displays: Event rows with operation, correlation_id, duration_ms, timestamp
Drift entries with case_type, severity, description

shadow_mode_badge.displays: Shadow Mode or Live Mode based on flags

mocked_api_note: No mocked APIs - all endpoints backed by real HotelRunner API and MongoDB
